name: Boost Buckle
desc:
The equipped monster gains 300 ATK.
If this card is sent to the GY from the hand, or by the effect of an equipped "Desire Hero" monster: You can target 1 face-up "Desire Hero" monster you control; negate its effects, and if you do, add it to your hand.
You can only use this effect of "Boost Buckle" once per turn.
